flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Roanoke-Chowan Community College are 14% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($29.3k vs $34.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Roanoke-Chowan Community College fell 94% between 2006 and 2009 (67.7% → 4.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Roanoke-Chowan Community College fell 45% between 2021 and 2024 (562 → 309).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 34% at Roanoke-Chowan Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (265 vs 404).
